children.label: show
description: /** Read access: view Agent Builder and read-only actions */

children.label: write
description: /** Create/update/delete for areas not covered by sub-features. */

start.label: AgentBuilderPluginStart
description: Public start contract for the browser-side agentBuilder plugin.

children.label: agents
description: Agent service contract, can be used to list agents.

children.label: attachments
description: Attachment service contract, can be used to register and retrieve attachment UI definitions.

children.label: tools
description: Tool service contract, can be used to list or execute tools.

children.label: events
description: Events service contract, can be used to listen to chat events.

children.label: openChat
description: Opens the conversation sidebar.

children.label: options
description: - Configuration options for the sidebar

returnComment: An object containing the sidebar reference

children.label: toggleChat
description:
Toggles the conversation sidebar.

If the sidebar is open, it will be closed. Otherwise, it will be opened.

children.label: addAttachment
description:
Adds an attachment to the active conversation sidebar.
If no sidebar is open, the attachment is ignored.

children.label: attachment
description: - The attachment to add

children.label: updateAttachmentOrigin
description:
Updates the origin of an attachment in a conversation.
Use this after saving a by-value attachment to link it to its persistent store.
signature: (conversationId: string, attachmentId: string, origin: string) => Promise<

children.label: conversationId
description: - The conversation containing the attachment

children.label: attachmentId
description: - The ID of the attachment to update

children.label: origin
description: - Origin string for the attachment (e.g. saved object id); same value passed to `resolve` on the server

returnComment: Promise resolving to the update result

interfaces.label: ConversationsStart
description: AgentBuilder conversations service's start contract (read-only).

children.label: getScopedClient
description: Returns a read-only conversation client scoped to the given request's user and space.

interfaces.label: ReadOnlyConversationClient
description: A read-only conversation client exposing only get and list operations.

children.label: get
description: Retrieve a single conversation by its ID, including all rounds.

children.label: list
description: List conversations for the current user, optionally filtered by agent ID.

interfaces.label: SmlChunk
description: A single SML chunk to be indexed.

children.label: type
description: Type of the chunk (e.g., 'dashboard', 'lens', 'esql')

children.label: content
description: Searchable content text

children.label: title
description: Display title

children.label: permissions
description: Permissions required to access the underlying element (e.g., 'saved_object:lens/get')

interfaces.label: SmlContext
description: Context passed to SML type hooks (`list` and `getSmlData`).

children.label: request
description: The current user's request, when available. Absent during background crawler runs.

interfaces.label: SmlData
description: Return value from getSmlData — normalized data to index.

interfaces.label: SmlIndexAttachmentParams
description: Parameters for the event-driven indexing API.

interfaces.label: SmlListItem
description: An item returned by the `list` hook of an SML type.

children.label: id
description: Unique ID of the attachment (e.g., saved object ID)

children.label: updatedAt
description: Last updated timestamp — used by crawler for change detection

children.label: spaces
description: Space IDs this item belongs to

interfaces.label: SmlStart
description: SML (Semantic Metadata Layer) start contract.

children.label: indexAttachment
description:
Event-driven indexing API. Allows integrations to react to
create/update/delete events and update SML data immediately.

interfaces.label: SmlToAttachmentContext
description: Context passed to the toAttachment hook.

interfaces.label: SmlTypeDefinition
description:
Server-side type definition for SML (Semantic Metadata Layer).

Registered via `agentBuilder.sml.registerType()` during plugin setup.

Solutions register these to make their content discoverable via the SML.

children.label: id
description: Unique identifier for this SML type (e.g., 'dashboard', 'lens', 'esql')

children.label: list
description:
Yield pages of items to consider for indexing.
Called by the crawler to enumerate candidates.
Each yielded array is one page; the crawler processes pages
with O(page_size) memory instead of loading everything at once.

children.label: getSmlData
description: Return normalized data to index for a specific item.

children.label: toAttachment
description: Convert an SML document into a conversation attachment.

children.label: fetchFrequency
description:
Optional: custom crawl interval for the crawler.
Defaults to '10m' if not provided.

interfaces.label: ToolsSetup
description: AgentBuilder tool service's setup contract

children.label: register
description: Register a built-in tool to be available in agentBuilder.

interfaces.label: ToolsStart
description: AgentBuilder tool service's start contract

children.label: execute
description: Execute a tool.

children.label: getRegistry
description: Return a tool registry scoped to the current user and context.

enums.label: ExecutionStatus
description: Possible statuses for an agent execution.

misc.label: SmlSearchResult
description:
An SML search result — same fields as {@link SmlDocument} plus relevance score.
`content` is optional when the query excluded it from `_source` (e.g. `skipContent`).

objects.label: smlElasticsearchIndexMappings
description:
Elasticsearch `mappings` block for the SML data index (e.g. integration tests, tooling).
Field definitions match `smlStorageSchemaProperties` / `storageSettings`.

setup.label: AgentBuilderPluginSetup
description: Setup contract of the agentBuilder plugin.

children.label: agents
description: Agents setup contract, which can be used to register built-in agents.

children.label: tools
description: Tools setup contract, which can be used to register built-in tools.

children.label: attachments
description: Attachments setup contract, which can be used to register attachment types.

children.label: hooks
description: Hooks setup contract, which can be used to register lifecycle event hooks.

children.label: skills
description: Skills setup contract, which can be used to register skills.

children.label: plugins
description: Plugins setup contract, which can be used to register built-in plugins.

children.label: sml
description:
SML (Semantic Metadata Layer) setup contract.
Used to register content types for discovery and search.

start.label: AgentBuilderPluginStart
description: Start contract of the agentBuilder plugin.

children.label: agents
description: Agents service, to execute agents.

children.label: tools
description: Tools service, to manage or execute tools.

children.label: skills
description: Skills service, to manage and access skills.

children.label: plugins
description: Plugins service, to query built-in and persisted plugins.

children.label: execution
description: Execution service, to execute agents and retrieve execution status.

children.label: runtime
description:
Runtime utilities for consumers that need to interact with LLM models
outside of the agent builder's built-in tool/agent execution flow.

children.label: sml
description:
SML (Semantic Metadata Layer) service, for event-driven indexing of
discoverable content.

children.label: conversations
description: Conversations service (read-only), to list and retrieve conversations.
